hero.headline: When your septic backs up, *we show up*
hero.subheadline: Family-owned New Haven septic team with 30 years of keeping systems flowing.

services_section.label: WHAT WE HANDLE
services_section.heading: Complete Septic Solutions
services_section.subheading: From routine pumping to full system repairs

services.title: Septic Pumping & Cleaning
services.description: Regular maintenance keeps your system running smooth. We pump out tanks and clear buildup before problems start.

services.title: System Inspections
services.description: Thorough evaluations for home sales, routine checks, or troubleshooting existing issues.

services.title: Septic Repairs
services.description: Broken pipes, failing pumps, or drainage issues. We diagnose the problem and fix it right.

services.title: New System Installation
services.description: Complete septic system design and installation for new construction or replacements.

about.heading: 30 Years of Septic Experience
about.body: We're a New Haven family business that's been handling septic systems since day one. Real people answering the phone, not a call center.

reviews.name: Nancy J.
reviews.text: Grateful to T. Palmer for helping us out in a pinch! Wonderful experience - they're reliable, professional, and experienced.

reviews.name: Hillary W.
reviews.text: Great experience with this family business. First-time homeowners with lots of questions and Sara was incredibly informative.

reviews.name: Jillian H.
reviews.text: Family owned, knowledgeable and trustworthy. Used them for inspection and they're our go-to septic company now.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving New Haven & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Local septic service throughout the region

cta.heading: Ready to Schedule Service?
cta.body: Free estimates on all septic work. Call or message us today.
